name: workflow-tier
description: The Workflow Tier — 8 portable multi-agent workflows + native human-in-the-loop gates + trajectory memory + cost-discipline doctrine. Anthropic CCR-compatible. The first workflow system that compounds across runs.

principles.schemaDiscipline: Every agent() call returning structured data uses JSON Schema. No 'model said yes but lied' failures.
principles.costContracts: Every workflow declares estimatedCost with calibratedRuns + lastRun data after 3+ runs. Guesses become evidence.
principles.tierModelDown: Bash agents use Haiku. Multi-dim review uses Sonnet. Synthesis-of-many uses Opus. Default tier inheritance is rarely correct.
principles.compositionContract: Portable workflows compose ONLY other portable workflows. Validator enforces.
principles.humanGate: Native HITL via workflow-gates substrate. The first workflow system that ships this primitive.
principles.trajectoryMemory: Every run learns from prior runs via workflow-trajectory. Lock-in via compounding quality.
principles.scheduledCascade: Daily (lite) → Weekly (deep) → Quarterly (strategic). Cost gates per cadence.

calibration.verdict: SOTA on schema discipline, cost contracts, scheduled cadence, adversarial review — rare even among VC-backed agent products
